---
title: "ARTEMIS Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  output_folder: "."
  n_examples: 5
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(ARTEMIS)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(stringr)

report_dir <- tryCatch(
  dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)),
  error = function(e) getwd()
)

if (!exists("params")) {
  params <- list(output_folder = report_dir, n_examples = 5)
}

output_folder <- params$output_folder
if (is.null(output_folder) || identical(output_folder, ".") || !nzchar(output_folder)) {
  output_folder <- report_dir
}
if (!grepl("^(/|[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\])", output_folder)) {
  output_folder <- file.path(report_dir, output_folder)
}
output_folder <- normalizePath(output_folder, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
n_examples <- params$n_examples

con_dfs <- readRDS(file.path(output_folder, "con_dfs.rds"))
processed <- readRDS(file.path(output_folder, "processed.rds"))
eras <- readRDS(file.path(output_folder, "eras.rds"))
stats_path <- file.path(output_folder, "stats.rds")
stats <- if (file.exists(stats_path)) readRDS(stats_path) else list()

cohort_summary_table <- function(con_df, processed_df) {
  n_cohort <- dplyr::n_distinct(con_df$person_id)
  n_with_regimen <- if (nrow(processed_df) == 0) 0 else dplyr::n_distinct(processed_df$personID)

  data.frame(
    Metric = c(
      "People in cohort",
      "People with >=1 detected regimen",
      "Proportion with >=1 detected regimen",
      "Distinct regimens detected"
    ),
    Value = c(
      n_cohort,
      n_with_regimen,
      round(n_with_regimen / max(n_cohort, 1), 3),
      if (nrow(processed_df) == 0) 0 else dplyr::n_distinct(processed_df$component)
    )
  )
}

regimens_per_person_plot <- function(processed_df) {
  counts <- processed_df %>%
    dplyr::count(personID, name = "n_regimens")

  ggplot(counts, aes(x = n_regimens)) +
    geom_histogram(
      binwidth = 1,
      boundary = 0,
      closed = "left",
      fill = "#33658A",
      color = "white"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Detected regimens per person",
      y = "Number of people",
      title = "Regimens per person"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

first_drug_offset_plot <- function(era_df) {
  offsets <- era_df %>%
    dplyr::distinct(personID, first_drug_exposure_day)

  ggplot(offsets, aes(x = first_drug_exposure_day)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 7, fill = "#F26419", color = "white") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30") +
    labs(
      x = "First drug exposure day relative to cohort start",
      y = "Number of people",
      title = "First drug exposure timing"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

example_subject_ids <- function(pa, n_examples) {
  pa %>%
    dplyr::distinct(personID, DrugRecord_full) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(drug_record_length = stringr::str_count(DrugRecord_full, ";")) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(drug_record_length), personID) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n_examples) %>%
    dplyr::pull(personID)
}

cohorts <- names(con_dfs)
```

## Cohort Summaries

```{r, results='asis'}
if (length(cohorts) == 0) {
  cat("No cohort outputs were found.\n")
}

for (cohort in cohorts) {
  con_df <- con_dfs[[cohort]]
  processed_df <- processed[[cohort]]
  era_df <- eras[[cohort]]
  stats_df <- stats[[cohort]]

  if (is.null(processed_df)) processed_df <- data.frame()
  if (is.null(era_df)) era_df <- data.frame()
  if (is.null(stats_df)) stats_df <- data.frame()

  cat("### ", cohort, "\n\n", sep = "")
  print(knitr::kable(cohort_summary_table(con_df, processed_df)))
  cat("\n")

  if (nrow(processed_df) > 0) {
    print(regimens_per_person_plot(processed_df))
    cat("\n")
  } else {
    cat("No processed regimens were detected for this cohort.\n\n")
  }

  if (nrow(era_df) > 0) {
    print(plotFrequency(era_df, top_n = 10))
    cat("\n")

    print(first_drug_offset_plot(era_df))
    cat("\n")

    if (nrow(stats_df) > 0) {
      print(knitr::kable(stats_df))
      cat("\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("No regimen eras were detected for this cohort.\n\n")
  }
}
```

## Example Alignments

```{r, results='asis'}
for (cohort in cohorts) {
  era_df <- eras[[cohort]]
  if (is.null(era_df) || nrow(era_df) == 0) {
    next
  }

  ids <- example_subject_ids(era_df, n_examples)
  if (length(ids) == 0) {
    next
  }

  cat("### ", cohort, "\n\n", sep = "")
  for (id in ids) {
    cat("#### Subject ", id, "\n\n", sep = "")
    print(plotAlignmentByCohort(dplyr::filter(era_df, personID == id)))
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```
